subject: IUI cycle 1 - claim ANJ-C1-001 reimbursement status

subject: IUI cycle 2 - claim ANJ-C2-001 reimbursement status

subject: IUI cycle 2 - LATE lab charge - invoice NNJFC-C2-INV2-LATE posted after cycle close
description: Additional lab-work reconciliation posted by Northern NJ Fertility Center on 2026-03-18 for cycle 2, amount $612.40. This charge landed AFTER the household cost tracker snapshot for cycle 2 and is not reflected there. It has been paid on the medical-expense ledger and mirror ledger. Aetna claim ANJ-C2-002 was filed against it on 2026-03-20; reimbursement flipped from PENDING to PAID on 2026-05-08 for $305.60 - the flip did not propagate back to the shared IVF cycle board or the household cost tracker.

description: Portal record for Aetna claim ANJ-C3-001 filed 2026-05-13 against Northern NJ Fertility Center invoice NNJFC-C3-INV1 ($2,085.00). Reimbursement adjudication in progress. Status: PENDING as of 2026-06-28. Expected turnaround 4-6 weeks per Aetna case handler.

subject: Record correction request - IUI cycle 2 total on patient portal
description: Requesting the patient portal running total for IUI cycle 2 be corrected to include the late lab-work charge (NNJFC-C2-INV2-LATE, $612.40, posted 2026-03-18). Current portal running total for cycle 2 shows $1,940.00; corrected total should be $2,552.40 gross ($1,682.40 net of the $870.00 Aetna reimbursement on ANJ-C2-001, minus the $305.60 reimbursement now paid on ANJ-C2-002 = $1,376.80 net final).

subject: IUI cycle 3 monitoring visit - additional co-insurance owed?
description: Patient query: after the CD12 monitoring visit on 2026-05-19 as part of IUI cycle 3, was a co-insurance line separately generated? The household cost tracker shows only the standard $260.00 monitoring copay; the medical ledger shows a $260.21 line. Discrepancy is $0.21 - likely rounding. Confirming so cycle 3 running total closes clean.

subject: IVF consultation deposit policy - Dr. Strand
description: Patient portal note: consultation booked for late summer 2026 with Dr. Strand. Deposit policy per portal FAQ is $250 hold on card at time of booking, applied to first-cycle invoice on completion. Card on file: Chase Sapphire Preferred ending 7788. No charge posted yet.

subject: Aetna partial-coverage confirmation for IVF projected cycle
description: Patient inquiry: Priya group plan (Aetna). Requesting written confirmation of partial coverage rate applicable to a projected IVF cycle. Aetna case handler response 2026-06-18: partial coverage applies at approximately 40% of allowed charges for one IVF cycle attempt annually, subject to plan documentation. Written confirmation letter forwarded to danny.wells@Greenridertech.co on 2026-06-19.

subject: Reissue receipt - NNJFC-C1-INV1 for FSA records
description: Patient reissue request: itemized receipt for NNJFC-C1-INV1 ($1,820.00, IUI cycle 1) needed for household medical records. Reissued as PDF to danny.wells@Greenridertech.co on 2026-04-02.

subject: Annual physical scheduling - Dr. Costas
description: Patient portal note: annual physical booking window is Nov 2026. Front desk confirmed booking template opens Sep 15. No charge posted yet.

subject: Dental cleaning January 2027 - deposit not required
description: Confirmation that no deposit is required for the annual January cleaning. Booking window opens November 2026.
